items.title: Rear Double Wishbone Suspension FEA
items.description: Static structural analysis of a rear double wishbone suspension assembly in SolidWorks Simulation. Analytical hand calculations, spring element modeling, and mesh convergence study verified a factor of safety of approximately 6.3. Solo project, Spring 2026.

items.title: Arc SSG: Smart Snow Goggles
items.description: HUD goggle system with micro OLED display and beamsplitter bird path optics. Delivers real time speed, temperature, and altitude data in the skier's line of sight without obstructing vision. Four prototype iterations over two semesters. $300 awarded through Innov8x Prototyping Fund.

items.title: Derby Car Design and Fabrication
items.description: Cybertruck aesthetic derby car designed and fabricated using milling, lathe, CNC machining, and laser cutting. Full technical drawing packet produced in SolidWorks. Fall 2025.

items.title: Chevron Combined Cycle Cogeneration Analysis
items.description: Thermodynamic analysis of a Chevron combined cycle cogeneration facility across four upgrade cases in EES. Steam reheat case achieved approximately 37.74% thermal efficiency with $2.08M per year natural gas savings and approximately 30,000 tonnes CO2 reduction. Partner project with Noah Whitaker, Spring 2026.

items.title: Drone Package Delivery Mechanism
items.description: Mechanical payload release and delivery mechanism for a drone package delivery system. Two-person team design project. Fall 2025.
